name: 05-12-zero-user-product-critique
title: brainstorm: brutal PM critique of zero-user FableMap
description: Record a brutal PM critique of why current FableMap positioning could get zero users and negative reviews, then extract rescue directions.
scope: product critique and follow-up PRD seed only; no code changes
creator: lijin
notes: Recorded brutal PM critique: current product risks reading as coordinate-tagged AI chat with excessive concept load, unclear owner ROI, weak visitor first minute, weak location proof, severe UGC cold start. Suggested rescue: official seed spaces, five-question owner flow, shareable hooks, token pain hidden from first visitor experience.

meta.critique_verdict: FAIL: product narrative failure, not merely implementation failure
